docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, ANIL AS TO DEFENDANT WOLF, KURT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
